name: Show Hidden Files in Finder
description: Reveals hidden files and folders (those starting with a dot) in Finder windows.

name: Show Path Bar in Finder
description: Displays the full path breadcrumb bar at the bottom of every Finder window.

name: Show Status Bar in Finder
description: Shows the status bar at the bottom of Finder windows displaying item count and available disk space.

name: Always Show File Extensions
description: Forces Finder to always display file extensions for all files, regardless of individual file settings.

name: Disable Warning When Changing Extension
description: Suppresses the confirmation dialog that appears when you rename a file and change its extension.

name: Show Full POSIX Path in Finder Title
description: Displays the full POSIX file path of the current folder in the Finder window title bar.

name: Default Finder View to List
description: Sets the default Finder view style to list view (Nlsv). Other options: icnv (icon), clmv (column), glyv (gallery).

name: Show ~/Library Folder
description: Makes the user's Library folder visible in Finder by removing the hidden flag.

name: Enable Dock Autohide
description: Automatically hides and shows the Dock when the cursor moves to the screen edge.

name: Disable Recent Apps in Dock
description: Removes the 'Recent Applications' section from the Dock for a cleaner layout.

name: Minimize Windows to Application Icon
description: When minimizing a window, it collapses into the application's Dock icon rather than creating a separate thumbnail.

name: Set Dock Tile Size to 36px
description: Sets the size of Dock icons to 36 pixels. Adjust the integer value for your preferred size.

name: Speed Up Dock Show/Hide Animation
command: defaults write com.apple.dock autohide-delay -float 0 && defaults write com.apple.dock autohide-time-modifier -float 0.25
revert_command: defaults delete com.apple.dock autohide-delay && defaults delete com.apple.dock autohide-time-modifier
description: Removes the autohide delay and speeds up the show/hide animation so the Dock appears instantly.

name: Set Dock Position to Left
description: Moves the Dock to the left side of the screen. Options: left, right, bottom.

name: Set Dock Position to Right
description: Moves the Dock to the right side of the screen. Options: left, right, bottom.

name: Change Screenshot Save Location
description: Changes the default folder where screenshots are saved. Replace the path with any desired directory.

name: Change Screenshot Format to JPG
description: Changes the screenshot file format to JPEG. Options: png, jpg, gif, pdf, tiff.

name: Disable Screenshot Shadow
description: Removes the drop shadow from window screenshots, producing cleaner image exports.

name: Disable Screenshot Floating Thumbnail
description: Disables the floating thumbnail preview that appears in the corner after taking a screenshot.

name: Disable Crash Reporter
description: Prevents the crash reporter dialog from appearing when an application crashes.

name: Enable Tap to Click (Trackpad)
command: defaults write com.apple.driver.AppleBluetoothMultitouch.trackpad Clicking -bool true && defaults -currentHost write NSGlobalDomain com.apple.mouse.tapBehavior -int 1
revert_command: defaults write com.apple.driver.AppleBluetoothMultitouch.trackpad Clicking -bool false && defaults -currentHost write NSGlobalDomain com.apple.mouse.tapBehavior -int 0
description: Enables tap-to-click on the trackpad, so a light tap registers as a click without pressing down.

name: Disable Auto-Correct
description: Turns off automatic spelling correction system-wide, useful for technical writing and coding.

name: Disable Smart Quotes
description: Disables the automatic replacement of straight quotes with typographic (curly) quote characters.

name: Disable Smart Dashes
description: Disables automatic replacement of double hyphens (--) with em dashes (—).

name: Set Faster Key Repeat Rate
command: defaults write NSGlobalDomain KeyRepeat -int 2 && defaults write NSGlobalDomain InitialKeyRepeat -int 15
revert_command: defaults write NSGlobalDomain KeyRepeat -int 6 && defaults write NSGlobalDomain InitialKeyRepeat -int 25
description: Speeds up keyboard repeat rate and reduces the initial delay before repeat kicks in. Useful for power users.

name: Enable Reduce Motion
description: Reduces animated transitions throughout the UI, which can improve performance and reduce eye strain.

name: Enable Dark Mode
description: Switches the system-wide appearance to Dark Mode, affecting the menu bar, Dock, and supported apps.

name: Enable Reduce Transparency
description: Reduces the translucency effect on menus, sidebars, and other UI elements, improving readability.

name: Enable Mission Control — Group Windows by App
description: Groups windows from the same application together in Mission Control rather than showing them individually.

name: Disable Automatic Space Switching
description: Prevents macOS from automatically switching to the Space where an app has open windows when you activate it.

name: Safari — Show Full URL in Address Bar
description: Shows the complete URL including protocol in the Safari address bar instead of just the domain name.

name: Safari — Enable Developer Menu
command: defaults write com.apple.Safari IncludeDevelopMenu -bool true && defaults write com.apple.Safari WebKitDeveloperExtrasEnabledPreferenceKey -bool true
revert_command: defaults write com.apple.Safari IncludeDevelopMenu -bool false && defaults write com.apple.Safari WebKitDeveloperExtrasEnabledPreferenceKey -bool false
description: Adds the Develop menu to Safari's menu bar, enabling web inspector, console, and other developer tools.

name: Safari — Disable Thumbnail Cache for History
description: Disables the caching of page thumbnails used in the Top Sites and history views.

name: Safari — Disable AutoFill
command: defaults write com.apple.Safari AutoFillFromAddressBook -bool false && defaults write com.apple.Safari AutoFillPasswords -bool false
revert_command: defaults write com.apple.Safari AutoFillFromAddressBook -bool true && defaults write com.apple.Safari AutoFillPasswords -bool true
description: Disables Safari's autofill for contact information and passwords.

name: Safari — Enable Do Not Track
description: Sends a Do Not Track HTTP header with every web request, asking websites not to track browsing activity.

name: Require Password Immediately After Sleep
command: defaults write com.apple.screensaver askForPassword -int 1 && defaults write com.apple.screensaver askForPasswordDelay -int 0
description: Requires your password immediately when the screen is locked or the screensaver activates.

name: Enable Firewall
description: Enables the macOS application firewall to block unauthorized incoming network connections.

name: Disable Remote Apple Events
description: Prevents other computers from sending Apple Events to your Mac, reducing the remote attack surface.

name: Configure Network Interface MTU
description: Sets the Maximum Transmission Unit size for a network interface (en0 = Wi-Fi or Ethernet).

name: Flush DNS Cache
description: Flushes the local DNS resolver cache, useful after changing DNS settings or troubleshooting name resolution.
